title: Figure 4 from: Abuhaliema A, Gharaibeh L, Jaradat E, Hammad M, Alshaer W (2026) Non-coding RNAs in gene therapy: mechanisms, delivery strategies, and clinical translation. Pharmacia 73: 1-25. https://doi.org/10.3897/pharmacia.73.e173259
author: Abuhaliema, Ali
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4 Future trends and timelines in ncRNA therapeutics. Projected short-, mid-, and long-term developments in ncRNA medicine, including advances in delivery systems, RNA chemistry, lncRNA and circRNA therapies, RNA editing, AI-driven RNA design, and personalized RNA therapeutics.
steps_raw: Figure 4 Future trends and timelines in ncRNA therapeutics. Projected short-, mid-, and long-term developments in ncRNA medicine, including advances in delivery systems, RNA chemistry, lncRNA and circRNA therapies, RNA editing, AI-driven RNA design, and personalized RNA therapeutics.
